name: Enbridge Sunrise
description: Pipeline construction and maintenance work. Enbridge contractor compliance required for all workers. Jackie Schmitke (McTavish) is the site contact for safety requirements.

name: Scottie Resources Baseline
description: Baseline environmental monitoring for Scottie Resources. Field contact: Megan Charlton (mcharlton@slrconsulting.com). SLR field support includes wildlife, SWQ, and hydrogeology components.

name: Brucejack Environmental Monitoring
description: Environmental monitoring program at Brucejack Mine. Various components: wildlife surveys, fish (EF), vegetation, Arch/Veg (David LeBeau), AEMP sampling, mountain goat surveys. Benton Dalgleish (ERM) is the site contact.

name: KSM Seabridge
description: Pre-clearing and environmental monitoring at KSM (Kerr-Sulphurets-Mitchell). Loc: Camp 11. Components include pre-clearing, goat/marmot surveys, wildlife-bear, groundwater, and meteorology.

name: PRGT Pipeline
client: Western LNG / Prince Rupert Gas Transmission
description: Prince Rupert Gas Transmission project through Nisga'a territory. Environmental and Indigenous engagement requirements.
